method_summary: The AI Scientist generates novel research ideas, writes code, executes experiments, visualizes results, writes full scientific papers, and conducts simulated peer review using large language models.
key_innovation: The first fully automated system that performs end-to-end scientific discovery from idea generation to paper writing and peer review.

key_results.near_human_performance: automated reviewer achieves near-human performance in evaluating paper scores
key_results.acceptance_threshold: papers exceed acceptance threshold at a top machine learning conference

best_result: Papers exceeding acceptance threshold at a top machine learning conference as judged by automated reviewer.
title: The AI Scientist: Towards Fully Automated Open-Ended Scientific Discovery
